zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Goodrich於1515年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可費爾申馬時，他的父親John Goodrich28歲，母親Johanna Addy30歲。他和Elizabeth至少有3個兒子。他去世於1570年2月22日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可費爾申馬聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Goodrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Goderiche, Old English Gōdrīc, composed of the elements gōd ‘good’ + rīc ‘power’.
English: habitational name from Goodrich (Herefordshire), a shortened form for ‘castle Goodrich’, which takes its name from Godric Mapson, a holder of the estate recorded in the Domesday Book.
Americanized form of German Güttrich, cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Goodrick
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): variant of   Goodrich  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Goodrich was born in 1515, in Felsham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Goodrich, was 28 and his mother, Johanna Addy, was 30. He had at least 3 sons with Elizabeth. He died on 22 February 1570, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Felsham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Goodrich(이)가 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Goodrich(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Addy(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Elizabeth(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1570년 2월 22일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프샤 스트 피터'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.
